hypothesis: If MACE, NequIP, and ViSNet are implemented in JAX and trained on SPICE2 with the stated regimen, then MD simulations on H100 GPUs—especially using JAX-MD and a gated, species-dependent-edge MACE variant—will achieve higher throughput than Torch+ASE baselines while maintaining comparable energy/force accuracy, because XLA compilation and the architectural modifications reduce inference overhead without sacrificing model expressivity.
